response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, technically broad individual contributor with a strong polyglot background, but this role demands a proven executive with documented organizational leadership — scaling and structuring engineering teams of 30+, governing hybrid delivery models, communicating roadmaps to boards, and shipping production multi-agent AI systems with financial stakes. His entire career is as a Senior or Staff Software Developer with no reported people management, no org design, no budget ownership, and no demonstrated CTO-track progression. His only AI-agent work began in April 2025 (roughly one month before this resume snapshot) and is described at a tooling-contributor level, not as an architect of production agentic systems in regulated environments.
strengths: Genuine distributed-systems depth from Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency DLang microservices) provides a credible backend foundation
Recent hands-on work with MCP-based agentic tooling and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq shows active engagement with the agentic AI domain
Fintech-adjacent experience at RIDE Capital (investment platform, TDD/CD culture) and Optilyz (pricing algorithms, AWS) offers relevant industry exposure
concerns: Zero evidence of people management or team-scaling; every role across 17+ years is an individual contributor title with no direct reports mentioned
Agentic AI experience is limited to ~one month at contributor level — does not approach 'demonstrated production multi-agent systems' as required
No executive-level responsibilities anywhere in the record: no board communication, no engineering org design, no governance of outsourced partners, no P&L ownership

key_factors.factor: No engineering leadership or management track record
